title: Build IQ1_S and IQ1_M quants for DeepSeek V4 Flash

history.note: Created. Hard prerequisite: v4-port-I-imatrix must be merged to feat/v4-port first (consumes tests/v4-port/calibration/imatrix-v4-flash.dat). Spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-07-v4-imatrix-iq1-design.md. Plan at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-07-v4-port-J-iq1-quants.md. Phased plan: build IQ1_S (Q5_K output/embed pin, IQ1_S body) → validate via gate-loader/coherence/tools → build IQ1_M same recipe → validate → split shards → upload to teamblobfish/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-GGUF under IQ1_S/ and IQ1_M/ subdirs → update HF README. Fallback: if gate-tools fails at Q5_K pin, bump to Q6_K and rebuild; if still fails, declare unviable and ship as research artifact.

Task I done and merged at 19b63dc36; depends_on satisfied. Skipping standalone plan-review: Plan J was reviewed alongside Plan I in Task I's codex round 1+2 (architect-revised at ec896e9e8, HF upload integration at a20be8ed5, both reviewed in the Task I diff). Worktree set up at /Users/cchuter/work/llama.cpp.J-iq1 from feat/v4-port. .dat copied from I-imatrix worktree (449 MB). Build configured + llama-quantize and llama-gguf-split built. Beginning IQ1_S quantize.

Q1 build matrix in progress. User added speed floor: any published quant must achieve ≥16 t/s decode (Q8_0 baseline). Required V4-specific tensor pins (output_hc, attn_compressor, hc_attn, hc_ffn, indexer, nextn, attn_output_a) added in 3 iterations because each surfaced as missing-imatrix at quantize time. Findings: IQ1_S vanilla Q5_K pin: tools FAIL (model emits </think> reasoning instead of tool_call JSON). IQ1_S vanilla Q6_K pin: tools FAIL (same pattern). bf16 source path: built bf16-experts-Q8 GGUF (288GB) by patching model_type to deepseek_v3 temporarily so transformers 5.5.1's broken rope-init doesn't fire (V4 not registered in transformers 5.5.1 yet). IQ1_S from bf16 source still tools FAIL. IQ1_M from bf16 source: tools FAIL AND speed FAIL (13.56 t/s, below 16 floor). IQ1_S-XL from bf16 (Q8_0 pins on all attention/hc/indexer/nextn): SPEED PASS (18.30 t/s) but tools still FAIL — model now hallucinates plausible weather data instead of looping. Currently building IQ1_M-XL (last Q1 variant per plan). If IQ1_M-XL fails, pivoting to Q2 family per user's standing fallback authorization.
